title.zh: NimbusCRM 应该在本季度发布 AI Deal Coach 增值包吗？
title.en: Should NimbusCRM launch the AI Deal Coach add-on this quarter?

question.zh: 产品团队是否应该在本季度投入 3 名工程师和 1 名产品经理，用 8 周时间把 AI Deal Coach 增值包上线到所有付费工作区？
question.en: Should the product team commit three engineers and one product manager for eight weeks to launch the AI Deal Coach add-on to all paying workspaces this quarter?

current_state.zh: 团队目前只有设计伙伴试点、少量管理员访谈和原型阶段的支持反馈，还没有足够把握直接做全量上线判断。
current_state.en: The team currently has a design-partner pilot, a handful of admin interviews, and prototype support feedback, but not enough confidence for an immediate broad-launch call.

hypothesis.zh: 至少 12% 的符合条件付费工作区会启用 AI Deal Coach，且其中 70% 的启用者在 60 天后仍持续使用。
hypothesis.en: At least 12% of eligible paying workspaces will activate the AI Deal Coach and 70% of activators will still use it after 60 days.

success_metric.zh: 增购率至少达到 12%，且启用工作区的 60 天留存率至少达到 70%。
success_metric.en: At least 12% attach rate and at least 70% 60-day retention among activated workspaces.

source_summary.zh: 相邻工作流产品的历史增值包发布表现
source_summary.en: Historical add-on launches for adjacent workflow products

source_summary.zh: 对现有销售团队管理员的结构化访谈
source_summary.en: Structured interviews with existing sales-team administrators

source_summary.zh: 公司内部高阶 AI 功能采用率基准
source_summary.en: Internal benchmark for adoption of premium AI features

label.zh: 在设计伙伴试点中愿意支付试点订金的付费工作区
label.en: Paying workspaces that accepted a paid pilot deposit during the design-partner offer

name.zh: ICP 访谈把 deal coaching 列为高优先级工作流缺口
name.en: ICP interviews ranked deal coaching as a top workflow gap

summary.zh: 14 位目标管理员中有 9 位把会前准备和 deal coaching 排进前三大工作流缺口。
summary.en: 9 of 14 target admins ranked meeting prep plus deal coaching as one of the top three workflow gaps.

notes.zh: 访谈证据有价值，但仍容易受到口头偏好高估的影响。
notes.en: Interview evidence is useful but still vulnerable to stated-preference inflation.

name.zh: 相邻竞品在上市初期的增购率较强
name.en: Adjacent competitor reported strong attach at launch

summary.zh: 一款相近的销售赋能产品在上市后的首个季度报告了略高于 11% 的增购率。
summary.en: A nearby sales-enablement product reported an attach rate slightly above 11% during its first quarter after launch.

notes.zh: 对标产品在买方类型上相近，但工作流深度并不完全一致。
notes.en: The comparison product is similar in buyer type but not identical in workflow depth.

name.zh: 原型阶段的支持负担高于预期
name.en: Prototype support burden was higher than expected

summary.zh: 8 个内部试点账号中有 6 个需要人工调整提示词或设置，才能产出有用的 coaching 结果。
summary.en: 6 of 8 internal pilot accounts needed manual prompt or settings intervention to get useful coaching outputs.

notes.zh: 这代表了真实执行风险，如果不解决，可能直接压低留存。
notes.en: This is meaningful execution risk and could suppress retention if unresolved.

name.zh: 扩张信号取决于管理员控制能力
name.en: Expansion signal depends on admin controls

summary.zh: 两家设计伙伴表示，如果首发版本包含经理控制台和管理员分析功能，他们会扩大 seat 覆盖范围。
summary.en: Two design partners said they would expand seat coverage if the launch included manager controls and admin analytics.

notes.zh: 这是积极信号，但前提是首发版本真的交付了关键控制能力。
notes.en: This is promising, but still conditional on shipping the right controls.

name.zh: 本季度直接大范围上线
先跑 6 周带管理员控制能力的付费试点
name.en: Run a 6-week paid pilot with admin controls first

candidates.zh: 先运行一个 6 周的付费试点，补齐经理控制能力，并在至少 120 个符合条件的工作区中测量增购率和 60 天留存。
candidates.en: Run a 6-week paid pilot with manager controls and measure attach plus 60-day retention on at least 120 eligible workspaces.

candidates.zh: 补齐管理员控制能力和模板预设后，重新测量仍需人工介入支持的账户比例。
candidates.en: Measure how many support interventions are still needed after shipping admin controls and template presets.

candidates.zh: 验证设计伙伴支付的订金是否会在 30 天内转化为真实的周活跃使用。
candidates.en: Test whether design-partner deposits convert into active weekly usage within 30 days.

initial_problem_statement.zh: 我们想判断这个增值包能不能在本季度直接全面上线，但目前信息还不够完整。
initial_problem_statement.en: We want to know whether this add-on can launch broadly this quarter, but the current picture is still incomplete.

initial_state.zh: 已有设计伙伴兴趣和少量产品信号，但还没有形成对上线风险和阈值的完整判断。
initial_state.en: There is early design-partner interest and a few product signals, but not a full read on launch risk and thresholds.

user_input_summary.zh: 用户先给了产品方向、设计伙伴兴趣和目标指标，但还没有真实行为与执行风险拆解。
user_input_summary.en: The user starts with the product direction, design-partner interest, and target metrics, but without real behavior data or a breakdown of execution risk.

assistant_focus.zh: 先给出弱先验，并明确还缺哪类证据才能做季度上线决策。
assistant_focus.en: Start with a weak prior and identify the evidence still required for a quarterly launch decision.

new_information.zh: 至少存在设计伙伴层面的兴趣信号。
new_information.en: There is at least some design-partner interest.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 是否有真实付费或订金行为？
assistant_next_questions.en: Is there any real paid or deposit behavior?

assistant_next_questions.zh: 原型需要多少人工支持？
assistant_next_questions.en: How much manual support does the prototype require?

interim_judgment.zh: 目前只能说明方向有机会，还不能直接做全量上线决策。
interim_judgment.en: So far the direction looks plausible, but not strong enough for a broad launch decision.

user_input_summary.zh: 用户补充了设计伙伴试点中愿意支付订金的工作区数据。
user_input_summary.en: The user adds design-partner pilot data showing which workspaces accepted a paid pilot deposit.

assistant_focus.zh: 把真实行为数据纳入更新，并检查对先验的修正幅度。
assistant_focus.en: Fold real behavior into the update and see how much it moves the prior.

new_information.zh: 72 个工作区里有 15 个接受付费试点订金。
new_information.en: 15 of 72 workspaces accepted a paid pilot deposit.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 这些工作区在启用后会不会持续使用？
assistant_next_questions.en: Will these workspaces keep using the feature after activation?

interim_judgment.zh: 真实付费意愿并不差，但还不足以证明全量上线后的留存和交付成本可控。
interim_judgment.en: The paid signal is meaningful, but it still does not prove retention and delivery cost are under control for a broad launch.

stage.zh: 补充执行风险和管理员控制条件
stage.en: Add execution risk and admin-control conditions

user_input_summary.zh: 用户补充了人工支持负担，以及两家设计伙伴对管理员控制能力的明确前提。
user_input_summary.en: The user adds the manual support burden and the explicit admin-control condition stated by two design partners.

assistant_focus.zh: 识别哪些证据真正推动上线，哪些证据拉低留存和规模化概率。
assistant_focus.en: Separate the signals that support launch from the ones that reduce retention and scalability.

new_information.zh: 支持负担高于预期，会压低直接全量上线的成功率。
new_information.en: Support burden is higher than expected and lowers the odds of a direct broad launch.

new_information.zh: 如果先补管理员控制能力，设计伙伴愿意扩大 seat 覆盖。
new_information.en: If admin controls are added first, design partners are willing to expand seat coverage.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 先做带管理员控制能力的试点，验证留存是否达到阈值。
assistant_next_questions.en: Run a pilot with admin controls and verify whether retention reaches the threshold.

missing_information.zh: 更强的留存与支持成本证据
missing_information.en: Stronger evidence on retention and support cost

interim_judgment.zh: 现在已经足够判断‘不适合直接全量上线，但适合先跑付费试点’。
interim_judgment.en: There is now enough signal to say no to a direct broad launch, but yes to a paid pilot first.

stage.zh: 行动阈值与最终决策收口

user_input_summary.zh: 用户补充了本季度资源成本、试点成本和成功阈值，允许做行动比较。
user_input_summary.en: The user adds quarterly resource cost, pilot cost, and success thresholds, making action comparison possible.

assistant_focus.zh: 把最新后验映射到行动阈值，判断是否已具备正式决策条件。
assistant_focus.en: Map the latest posterior to action thresholds and decide whether the case is now ready for a formal decision.

new_information.zh: 已经有明确的全量上线、付费试点和延后方案的收益损失参数。
new_information.en: The payoffs for broad launch, paid pilot, and delay are now explicit.

interim_judgment.zh: 现在已经可以做正式决策：不建议本季度直接大范围上线，建议先跑 6 周带管理员控制能力的付费试点。
interim_judgment.en: The case is now ready for a formal decision: do not launch broadly this quarter; run the 6-week paid pilot with admin controls first.
